sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: MPC Price History for Marathon Petroleum Corp Stock
feed.summary: The article provides a comprehensive price history for Marathon Petroleum Corp (MPC) stock on Barchart.com. It details various data points including daily prices, trade logs, corporate actions, and key 52-week performance metrics like highs, lows, and Fibonacci levels. The page also offers extensive tools for members to download historical data and analyze price movements.

feed.title: Regeneron, Sanofi: FDA approves Dupixent for treatment of CSU in ages 2-11
feed.summary: The U.S. FDA has approved Dupixent, co-developed by Regeneron and Sanofi, for the treatment of chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU) in children aged 2 to 11. This approval expands the drug's use, previously sanctioned for adults and adolescents 12 and older with CSU, specifically for those who remain symptomatic despite antihistamine treatment.

feed.title: 'Canny Pack' unveiled, Coca-Cola reveals bag for soda cans
feed.summary: Coca-Cola has announced "The Canny Pack," a fanny pack designed to hold Diet Coke cans, in collaboration with "The Devil Wears Prada 2" movie. Crafted from top-grain leather and silver in color, the limited-edition accessory will not be sold but displayed at Saks Fifth Avenue and given away through influencer Kristen Hollingshaus. The initiative merges fashion with pop culture and highlights Diet Coke's brand identity.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide Balances Margin Pressure With Strong Service
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide's Q1 2026 earnings call revealed robust service growth and a strong modernization backlog, largely driven by demand for existing elevator maintenance and upgrades, particularly in the Americas. While facing margin pressure and softness in new equipment sales, especially from China, the company maintained its full-year sales outlook and upgraded its profit range, expecting a rebound in the second half of 2026. Strategic investments in digital capabilities and new product introductions, coupled with strong cash generation and capital returns, underscore confidence in long-term growth despite near-term headwinds.

feed.title: Slide insurance CEO Lucas sells $2.3m in SLDE shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Bruce Lucas, CEO of Slide Insurance Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:SLDE), sold 118,055 shares for approximately $2.3 million through a pre-arranged trading plan. This sale occurred on April 20, 2026, with shares sold at a weighted average price of $19.55. Despite the sale, the company's stock has performed well, gaining nearly 21% in the last six months, and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro analysis.

feed.title: News Corp Activates US$1 Billion Nasdaq Share Repurchase Program
feed.summary: News Corp has announced a US$1 billion share repurchase program for its Nasdaq-listed Class A and B common stock. This buy-back initiative, which excludes ASX-listed CDIs, aims to enhance shareholder value and support the company's capital management strategy. The repurchases will occur periodically in the open market, influenced by market conditions and stock price.

feed.title: Columbia Gas Of PA Awards $50,000 In Environmental Action Grants To 11 Nonprofits
feed.summary: Columbia Gas of Pennsylvania and the NiSource Charitable Foundation have awarded $50,000 in Environmental Action Grants to 11 nonprofit organizations across Pennsylvania. This new annual program, announced on Earth Day 2026, supports local environmental restoration and education projects with grants of up to $5,000 each. The initiative aims to foster ongoing partnerships and expand NiSource's environmental efforts across its six-state service area.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs sells QVC group stock worth $5,081
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs and its subsidiary recently reported trading activity in QVC Group, Inc. Series A Common Stock on April 20, 2026. The firm acquired 10,006 shares for $5,503 and concurrently sold 9,964 shares for $5,081, operating as a market maker. Goldman Sachs Group Inc. and Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC are identified as 10% owners of QVC Group, and the transactions occurred amidst significant volatility and an 89% plunge in QVC Group shares over the past year.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] LENNOX INTERNATIONAL INC Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: Viking Global Investors and its affiliated entities have reported a shared beneficial ownership of 1,815,350 shares of Lennox International Inc. common stock, representing 5.2% of the class. This disclosure is made via a Schedule 13G filing, indicating a passive investment. The filing details the breakdown of ownership among various Viking Global entities and clarifies the shared voting and dispositive power attributed to Viking Global Investors and key individuals O. Andreas Halvorsen and Rose S. Shabet under SEC Rule 13d-3.

feed.title: Maase Inc Stock Explodes 21% on Renewed AI Acquisition Momentum and Speculative Buying
feed.summary: Maase Inc. shares surged over 21% driven by renewed speculative interest in its pivot to AI, following a turbulent period. The company, which was formerly Puyi Inc., has been strategically acquiring AI-related assets, most notably Huazhi Future, to transform itself from a financial services platform into a full-stack AI industry player. Despite facing challenges like ongoing net losses and significant stock volatility, investors are betting on its long-term potential in the high-growth AI sector.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs mixed trades in QVC Group (QVCGA) market-making filing
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs engaged in mixed trading activity of QVC Group (QVCGA) Series A Common Stock on April 20, 2026, acting as a market maker. These transactions involved both sales and purchases at prices between $0.51 and $0.55 per share, resulting in a minor net purchase of 42 shares. The filing clarifies that Goldman Sachs holds these shares directly, while The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. holds them indirectly, with both disclaiming beneficial ownership beyond their pecuniary interest.

feed.title: Defiance Daily Target 2x Short MSTR ETF
feed.summary: This page provides comprehensive data and analysis for the Defiance Daily Target 2x Short MSTR ETF (SMST), including its price, valuation, expense ratio, holdings, performance, and technical indicators. It also features comparisons with other ETFs in its category and segment, alongside recent news and educational resources related to ETF investing.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical Earnings Call Signals Robust Growth
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical's latest earnings call revealed robust growth in revenue and procedures, driven by strong adoption of its da Vinci and Ion systems. Despite challenges in China and Japan, bariatric procedure decline, and cost headwinds, the company raised its 2026 da Vinci procedure growth outlook. Management expressed confidence in the long-term trajectory of robotic surgery, balancing powerful growth engines with manageable external factors.

feed.title: Western Digital (WDC) exec withholds 4,595 shares to cover tax on awards
feed.summary: Western Digital's Chief of Global Operations, Gubbi Vidyadhara K, has withheld 4,595 shares of common stock to cover tax obligations related to equity compensation. The transaction also involved the conversion of dividend equivalent rights into 34.8121 common shares and the acquisition of an additional 34 common shares. These actions are routine tax and compensation-related activities and do not represent open-market sales or purchases.

feed.title: Chesterfield crews contain fire at Dominion Energy facility
feed.summary: Chesterfield Fire and EMS are on the scene of a fire at a Dominion Energy facility, with crews working to contain it in the 500 block of Coxendale Road. The fire, caused by hot embers from demolition work on old steam stacks, is contained within a concrete structure, posing no danger to the public. There were no injuries or damage to the power station's operating areas.

feed.title: SunOpta receives court approval for $6.50/share Refresco deal By Investing.com
feed.summary: SunOpta Inc. has received final court approval from the Ontario Superior Court of Justice for its acquisition by an affiliate of Refresco Holding B.V. for $6.50 per share in cash. The acquisition price comes after a 57% surge in the stock over the past year, with shares currently trading at the offer price, aligning closely with an InvestingPro Fair Value of $6.85. The deal, which also secured Canadian competition clearance and U.S. antitrust clearance, is expected to close by the second quarter of 2026, valuing SunOpta at approximately $1.1 billion.

feed.title: Danaher prices €3 billion senior notes offering
feed.summary: Danaher Corporation has priced an offering of €3 billion in euro-denominated senior notes across four tranches, with proceeds intended to fund the acquisition of Masimo Corporation and for general corporate purposes. This debt issuance occurs while Danaher's stock trades near its 52-week low, though InvestingPro analysis suggests the company is undervalued and has a moderate debt-to-equity ratio, with strong cash flow coverage for interest payments. The offering is expected to close on April 29, 2026, and is supported by several major financial institutions as underwriters.

feed.title: Western Digital chief legal officer sells $136,883 in stock
feed.summary: Western Digital's Chief Legal Officer, Cynthia L Tregillis, reported selling 363 shares of the company's common stock for $136,883 and disposing of 1,308 shares worth $489,335 for tax obligations. These transactions occurred as the stock trades near its 52-week high after a significant rally. The company has also been engaged in debt reduction and received a rating upgrade from S&P Global Ratings.

feed.title: Oasis management sells $1.46 million in Stratus Properties stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Oasis Management Co Ltd., a major shareholder in Stratus Properties Inc. (NASDAQ:STRS), sold approximately $1.46 million worth of common stock in mid-April through multiple transactions. These sales occurred between April 17 and April 20, 2026, with share prices ranging from $29.9043 to $30.0277, despite the stock's 74% surge over the past year. InvestingPro analysis suggests the shares are currently overvalued, creating a contrast with the company's aggressive share buyback program.

feed.title: Ra Capital sells $10.17 million of Vor Biopharma common stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: RA Capital Healthcare Fund LP sold 630,374 shares of Vor Biopharma Inc. (NASDAQ:VOR) common stock for approximately $10.17 million across two transactions in April 2026. Following these sales, RA Capital Healthcare Fund LP retains 2,567,245 shares of Vor Biopharma. The company has recently shifted its focus to autoimmune therapies and initiated a global Phase 3 trial for Sjögren’s disease, while analysts have adjusted price targets but largely maintain positive ratings due to promising drug potential.

feed.title: Sturm, Ruger & Company, Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Wednesday, May 6
feed.summary: Sturm, Ruger & Company, Inc. (NYSE: RGR) will announce its first quarter 2026 financial results and file its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after market close. The company will host a webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET that evening to discuss these results, with pre-registration required for those wishing to ask questions. Sturm, Ruger & Co., Inc. is a leading manufacturer of firearms for the commercial sporting market.

feed.title: Arcus Biosciences (RCUS) Moves 7.8% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
feed.summary: Arcus Biosciences (RCUS) stock rose 7.8% on impressive volume due to investor confidence in its pipeline candidates for cancer. Despite this, the company is expected to post a quarterly loss, and the consensus EPS estimate has remained unchanged, suggesting that sustained strength might depend on future earnings estimate revisions. Investors are advised to monitor RCUS and consider its Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) status.

feed.title: SM Energy (SM) Is Up 6.3% After Upgraded Earnings Outlook and Production Forecasts - Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: SM Energy (SM) recently saw a 6.3% rise following upgraded earnings outlooks and production forecasts, supported by Wells Fargo's robust production projections and a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy). While these developments reinforce the near-term bull case for stronger earnings, the core investment narrative and risk of sustaining performance from regions like Uinta without compressing margins or encountering logistical issues remain key considerations. The company's recent refinancing efforts are expected to support earnings by lowering interest costs and extending maturities.

feed.title: Tim Cook Steps Down from Apple CEO Role
feed.summary: Tim Cook is stepping down as Apple CEO later this year after a 15-year tenure, transitioning to executive chairman on September 1, 2026. He will be succeeded by John Ternus, currently senior vice president of hardware engineering. Cook leaves a legacy of massive growth and global expansion, having increased Apple's valuation and revenue significantly, but Ternus will face challenges in artificial intelligence and shifting consumer expectations.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Aligns MTAP Precision Oncology Push With Solar Shift
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) has announced an expanded collaboration with Foundation Medicine for a next-generation sequencing companion diagnostic to identify patients with homozygous MTAP deletion, advancing its precision oncology initiatives. Concurrently, the company committed to sourcing 145 MW of solar power from Geronimo Power's Blevins Solar Project as part of its sustainability efforts. These dual advancements in scientific and ESG priorities come as BMY's stock has seen significant gains, up 10.0% year-to-date and 27.2% over the past year.

feed.title: Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) Director Sells $834,607.42 in Stock
feed.summary: Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) Director Ronald Tysoe sold 4,666 shares of the company's stock for $834,607.42 on April 20th, reducing his stake by 17.21%. The company recently reported quarterly earnings of $1.24 per share, in line with estimates, and revenue of $2.84 billion, an 8.9% year-over-year increase. Cintas also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share, with an ex-dividend date of May 15th, and currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $215.17.

feed.title: Charles Schwab Issues $1.5 Billion 6.100% Fixed-Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series L – Underwriting Agreement Details and Key Terms 10, 51
feed.summary: Charles Schwab Corporation has announced a $1.5 billion offering of 6.100% Fixed-Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series L. The offering consists of 1,500,000 depositary shares, each representing a 1/100th interest in a Series L Preferred Stock, and is led by a syndicate of major investment banks. This issuance aims to strengthen Schwab's capital base, with the depositary shares intended to be listed on the NYSE within 30 days of initial delivery.

feed.title: Danaher Corp Estimates Net Proceeds From Senior Notes Sale At 2.98 Billion Euros
feed.summary: Danaher Corp has announced its estimate for net proceeds from a senior notes sale, totaling 2.98 billion Euros. This information was reported by Reuters via Refinitiv and is a key financial update for the company.

feed.title: To help fund its Masimo acquisition, Danaher prices €3B debt
feed.summary: Danaher Corporation has priced a €3.0 billion senior notes offering across four tranches due 2028, 2030, 2034, and 2038 to primarily fund its acquisition of Masimo Corporation. The estimated net proceeds of approximately €2.98 billion will be used for a portion of the cash consideration and associated costs of the Masimo deal, which is expected to close on April 29, 2026. The offering includes both floating and fixed-rate notes, with the largest tranche being €1.0 billion at 4.000% due in 2038.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reconsider Becton Dickinson (BDX) After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: Becton Dickinson (BDX) has experienced prolonged share price weakness, with its stock broadly flat over the last month and down significantly year-to-date and over three and five years. Despite this, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the company is undervalued by 27.5%, with an estimated intrinsic value of $214.69 per share compared to its current price of approximately $155.65. The company's P/E ratio of 25.2x also sits below its calculated "Fair Ratio" of 29.1x, further indicating a potential undervaluation relative to its earnings profile and industry peers.

feed.title: Xylem Announces Participation at Upcoming Investor Conferences
feed.summary: Xylem Inc. (NYSE: XYL), a global water solutions company, announced its participation in two upcoming investor conferences. The company will present and engage in investor meetings at the Oppenheimer 21st Annual Industrial Growth Conference on May 7 and the Stifel 2026 Boston Cross Sector 1x1 Conference on June 3. Xylem, a Fortune 500 company, reported $9 billion in revenue in 2025 by optimizing water and resource management.

feed.title: American Express Expands Small Business Support And Premium NFL Experiences
feed.summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) has announced initiatives to expand its support for small businesses in Canada through a grant program and enhance its premium experiential offerings with an extended NFL partnership for the 2026 NFL Draft. These strategic moves aim to strengthen customer loyalty, reinforce its brand as a premium provider, and deepen engagement with core customer segments, rather than focusing on immediate financial impact. Investors are advised to monitor the long-term effects of these programs on card uptake, spending behavior, and customer retention.

feed.title: Roivant Sciences(ROIV.US) Officer Sells US$5.92 Million in Common Stock
feed.summary: An officer of Roivant Sciences (ROIV.US), Venker Eric, sold 200,000 shares of common stock on April 20, 2026. The transaction was valued at approximately $5.92 million, with an average selling price of $29.59 per share. This transaction is considered an insider trade and is required to be reported under federal securities laws.

feed.title: Prologis, Inc. 2026 Q1 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NYSE:PLD) 2026-04-22
feed.summary: Prologis, Inc. has published its Q1 2026 earnings call presentation. The company reported EPS of $1.03, beating estimates by $0.30, and revenue of $2.13 billion, a 6.94% year-over-year increase, beating by $6.81 million. This article provides access to the slide deck presented during their earnings call.

feed.title: Genuine Parts Co. stock underperforms Wednesday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Co. (GPC) stock fell by 2.83% to $111.74 on Wednesday, underperforming the broader market as the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average both saw gains. The company's shares closed 26.28% below their 52-week high reached in February.

feed.title: Gibraltar Industries Inc (ROCK) Shares Surge 3.3% -- What GF Score of 71 Tells Investors
feed.summary: Gibraltar Industries Inc. (ROCK) shares surged 3.3% but remain significantly undervalued according to GuruFocus's GF Value™, which estimates a potential upside of 46.5%. The company holds an "Above Average" GF Score™ of 71/100, driven by strong financial strength and profitability, despite challenges in growth and valuation scores. Notably, insiders have purchased $0.8 million in stock over the last three months, signaling confidence in its future.

feed.title: Insider Sell: James Thompson Sells 1,000 Shares of JB Hunt Trans
feed.summary: James Thompson, a Director at JB Hunt Transport Services Inc (JBHT), sold 1,000 shares of the company on April 21, 2026, reducing his ownership to 0.8991 shares. This transaction is part of a pattern showing 20 insider sells against 3 insider buys over the past year for JBHT. The stock is currently trading at $254.28, which is significantly overvalued compared to its GF Value of $179.96, with a high price-earnings ratio of 38.24.

feed.title: Park Aerospace Corp (PKE) Stock Down 4.2% but Still Overvalued -- GF Score: 62/100
feed.summary: Park Aerospace Corp (PKE) shares dropped by 4.2% to $33.71, yet GuruFocus assesses the stock as significantly overvalued with a GF Value™ of $17.53, indicating a 92.3% overvaluation. Despite a strong Financial Strength rating of 9/10, the company's Growth and Valuation ranks are low at 2/10 and 1/10 respectively, suggesting considerable risk for investors at its current price. Insider transactions have been absent in the last three months, pointing to a neutral outlook from company executives.

feed.title: Pinnacle Financial Partners (PNFP) Reports Strong Q1 Revenue Growth
feed.summary: Pinnacle Financial Partners (PNFP) announced strong first-quarter revenue of $1.22 billion, surpassing analyst expectations, and an increased net interest margin of 3.53%. The company's GF Score™ of 83/100 and a P/E ratio of 12.16x suggest it may be an undervalued investment opportunity with significant long-term growth potential. Insider buying activity further indicates confidence in the company's future prospects.

feed.title: Pinnacle West declares $0.91 quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: Pinnacle West Capital Corporation announced a quarterly dividend of $0.91 per share, payable on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record by May 4, 2026. The company will also release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on May 4, 2026, followed by a conference call. Recent performance showed full-year EPS of $5.05 and Q4 2025 EPS of $0.13, both exceeding estimates, despite a revenue miss.

feed.title: Evercore ISI raises Truist Financial stock price target on fee income outlook
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has increased its price target for Truist Financial (NYSE:TFC) to $58 from $55, maintaining an Outperform rating, due to an improved fee income outlook, lower tax rate, and reduced share count. The firm also raised its 2026 and 2027 EPS estimates. Truist Financial's stock currently trades at $50.95 and boasts a 4.08% dividend yield with 54 consecutive years of dividend payments.

feed.title: RingCentral CAO Tarun Arora sells $40,979 in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Tarun Arora, Chief Accounting Officer at RingCentral, Inc. (NASDAQ:RNG), sold 953 shares of company stock for a total of $40,979. This transaction was conducted as per a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. The sale occurs while RingCentral shares are trading near their 52-week high, with InvestingPro analysis indicating the stock remains undervalued despite recent gains.

feed.title: New PROG Holdings Research Offers Insight into Near- and Below-Prime Consumer Behavior
feed.summary: PROG Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PRG) released new research focusing on the financial challenges faced by near- and below-prime consumers, coinciding with Financial Literacy Month. The survey revealed that over 80% of working Americans in this group are concerned about their financial outlook, driven by factors like inflation and rising costs. The research also highlighted the critical role of flexible payment solutions, such as buy-now, pay-later, and lease-to-own, in helping these consumers manage expenses and make necessary purchases.

feed.title: Trump Approval Underwater As Stock Market Gains Fail To Sway Voters - Invesco QQQ Trust, Series 1 (NASDAQ
feed.summary: Despite the stock market reaching record highs, President Donald Trump's approval rating remains underwater at 44% with a 53% disapproval, according to a new Morning Consult poll. Voters are more concerned about the affordability of healthcare, general costs, and energy prices, seeing a significant disconnect between the president's priorities and their financial struggles. This indicates that strong market performance is not translating into increased voter confidence for Trump, as everyday economic concerns take precedence.

feed.title: Capital One Q1 2026 Earnings Report: Profit Below Forecasts, Stock Down - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Capital One Financial Corp. reported first-quarter 2026 earnings that fell short of analysts' expectations, with adjusted earnings per share of $4.42 against an average estimate of $4.56. The company also saw a significant 72% increase in provisions for credit losses, reaching $4.07 billion. Following the announcement, Capital One's stock declined in extended trading, having already dropped 16% year-to-date.

feed.title: Raymond James extends AI rollout but CEO says personal relationships will ‘trump’ any tech or bot
feed.summary: Raymond James is expanding the rollout of its AI operations agent, Rai, to more advisors, but CEO Paul Shoukry emphasizes that personal relationships with clients will always be paramount over technology. While AI can improve efficiency and provide tailored insights, ultimately, the deep connections between advisors and clients are irreplaceable. The company reported strong Q2 financial results, with net revenue up 13% year-over-year.

feed.title: RingCentral (RNG) CAO Arora sells 953 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: RingCentral's Chief Accounting Officer, Tarun Arora, reported an open-market sale of 953 shares of Class A Common Stock at $43.00 per share, totaling $40,979. This transaction was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on March 14, 2025, rather than being an opportunistic sale. After the sale, Arora directly holds 74,539 shares of RingCentral, Inc.

feed.title: Real Brokerage Inc adds 60 plus agents and 300 million dollar annual volume with Solutions Group acquisition
feed.summary: Real Brokerage Inc has significantly expanded its presence in Florida by acquiring The Solutions Group, led by Lindsay Sanger Norton. This acquisition adds over 60 agents and more than $300 million in annual transaction volume to Real Brokerage Inc, particularly enhancing its foothold on Florida's Space Coast. This move aligns with Real Brokerage Inc's ongoing growth initiatives and efforts to strengthen its company culture and network identity, following recent recognitions for its leadership in agent financial technology.

feed.title: SLNO Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Soleno Therapeutics, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is reminding investors who purchased Soleno Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: SLNO) common stock between March 26, 2025, and November 4, 2025, of the May 5, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline for a securities fraud lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Soleno Therapeutics made false and misleading statements regarding the safety and commercial viability of its DCCR drug for Prader-Willi syndrome. Investors who suffered damages are encouraged to join the class action.

feed.title: RESIDEO TECHNOLOGIES, INC. ($REZI) CEO 2025 Pay Revealed
feed.summary: Jay Geldmacher, CEO of RESIDEO TECHNOLOGIES, INC. ($REZI), is estimated to have received $2,714,465 in compensation in 2025, a significant decrease from 2024. The article also details recent insider trading activity, with CHANNEL HOLDINGS II, L.P. CD&R and Andrew C Teich making purchases. Additionally, it highlights substantial government contract awards to REZI and summarizes recent hedge fund activity in the company's stock.
